pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json, task description (line 6), setup_task.sh (lines 12), and export_result.sh (line 7). FreeCAD FCStd is the native file format.
Consistent across task.json, task description (line 7), and export_result.sh (line 8). DXF is standard AutoCAD interchange format used by FreeCAD.

Task description specifies 'Draw a Rectangle representing the room with Width=5000 mm'. Verification script export_result.sh (line 70) checks 'abs(width - 5000) < 50'. Verifier.py (line 21) confirms '5000x4000 rectangle'.
Task description specifies 'Height=4000 mm'. Verification script export_result.sh (line 70) checks 'abs(height - 4000) < 50'. Verifier.py (line 21) confirms '5000x4000 rectangle'.
Task description specifies 'Center it at (2500, 2000)'. Verification script export_result.sh (line 89) checks 'abs(center.x - 2500) < 100'. Verifier.py (line 22) confirms 'Hexagon at (2500,2000)'.
Task description specifies 'Center it at (2500, 2000)'. Verification script export_result.sh (line 89) checks 'abs(center.y - 2000) < 100'. Verifier.py (line 22) confirms 'Hexagon at (2500,2000)'.

Task description specifies 'with a Radius of 600 mm'. Verification script export_result.sh (lines 75-76) documents hexagon properties: 'Hexagon width (flat-to-flat) = sqrt(3) * radius ~= 1.732 * 600 = 1039.2'. Verifier.py (line 22) confirms 'Hexagon at ... (Radius 600)'.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a FreeCAD 2D floor plan with a 5000 mm × 4000 mm rectangular room, a regular hexagonal table centered at coordinates (2500, 2000) with 600 mm radius, and a dimension line marking the room width. The completed work is saved as 'office_layout.FCStd' and exported as 'office_layout.dxf' to a user's FreeCAD Documents directory. All geometric specifications and file paths are internally consistent across task description, verification scripts, and verifier logic.
